record.field:
Hi ,

Thank you for registering with Zeeve.

We're glad to have you as part of our community of blockchain professionals.

Zeeve offers a range of blockchain infrastructure solutions for both public and private sector enterprises, web3 startups, and developers.

Our services include:

●

Rollups as a Service for zk Rollups and OP Rollups

●

AppChain Infrastructure as a Service (Avalanche L1s, Cosmos SDK, Parachains)

●

Dedicated Node Infrastructure

●

Traceye Data Indexing Infrastructure

●

Monitoring & Analytics

For support, you can visit our Developer Documentation . If you would like to discuss your specific needs or get further assistance, you can schedule a call with one of our experts using the link below:

Schedule a Call

Thank you once again for trusting Zeeve as your infrastructure partner.

Warm regards,
Yuvraj Singh Negi
Lead, Customer Success

Follow us at

© . All Rights Reserved

Hi ,

We received a request to reset your password for your Zeeve account. Click the button below to set a new password:

Reset Password


If you didn’t request this, you can safely ignore this email—your account is secure.

For any assistance, feel free to contact our support team at .

Stay secure,
Zeeve Team

Follow us at

© . All Rights Reserved
Your Zeeve OTP Code – Complete Your Registration

Hi ,

Welcome to Zeeve! To complete your registration, please use the OTP below:

[]


This code is valid for the next 10 minutes. Please enter it on the verification page to secure your account.

If you didn’t sign up for Zeeve, please ignore this email.

For any issues, reach out to our support team at .

Best regards,
Zeeve Team

Follow us at

© . All Rights Reserved
New user onboarded: {{ object.name or object.email }}

New user onboarded 🎉

A new user has just completed onboarding on .

Name
Email
Phone
Signup Type
Created On UTC
Email Verified

Open in Backend

This is an internal notification from .

Zeeve

Hi ,

Thank you for registering with Zeeve — we're excited to have you join a growing community of builders and validators shaping the future of blockchain infrastructure.

Since you're exploring Shardeum, you'll be glad to know that Zeeve offers the easiest and most reliable way to launch your Shardeum Validator Node—no DevOps, no complex setup, just plug-and-play.

Why choose Zeeve for Shardeum Validators?

✅ No-code deployment — Launch your node in minutes

✅ High-availability infrastructure — 99.99% uptime, active monitoring, and smart alerts

✅ Early validator access — Maximize SHM earnings and get in ahead of the crowd

✅ Centralized dashboard — Manage and monitor everything from one place

But Shardeum is just the beginning.

Zeeve also powers:

●

Rollups as a Service — For zk and OP rollups

●

AppChain Infrastructure — For Avalanche L1s, Cosmos SDK, Parachains

●

Enterprise-grade Node and Consortium Support

●

Traceye — Our powerful Web3 data indexing platform

●

Advanced Monitoring & Analytics for any deployment

For setup help or guidance on choosing the right validator plan, check out our Developer Documentation or schedule a call with our team:

Talk to an Expert

Welcome to the future of Web3 infrastructure—simplified.

Warm regards,
Yuvraj Singh Negi
Lead, Customer Success

Follow us at

© 2025 Zeeve. All Rights Reserved
Invitation to join {{ object.company_id.name }} on Zeeve

You've been invited!

Hi,

has invited you to join on Zeeve as an .

To get started, please set up your account by clicking the button below:

Setup Account

Since you already have an account, you can accept the invitation by clicking the button below:

Accept Invitation

Alternatively, you can follow these steps to accept manually:

1. Login to app.zeeve.io
2. Click on your profile icon (top right)
3. Select "Profile" from the dropdown menu.
4. Navigate to the "Invitations" Tab.
5. Click on "Accept Invite".

This invitation will expire on .

© 2025 Zeeve. All Rights Reserved.

Invitation Accepted

Hi ,

Great news! has accepted your invitation to join as an .

The user is now part of your organization and can access the assigned nodes and rollups.

© 2025 Zeeve. All Rights Reserved.

Invitation Declined

Hi ,

The invitation sent to to join has been declined.

© 2025 Zeeve. All Rights Reserved.
